column1: # Source: ClearPath-EC Software Reference rev 1.16 (April 7, 2026), 61 pages
# Models: ECSK, ECHP (part number CPM-ECxx-xxxxx-xxxx, e.g. CPM-ECHP-3411H-ELSB)
# type             name                   vid          pid         profile    encoder_counts     dc_assign          cycle_min_us   cycle_quant_us   sync_modes
#   vid=0x0C96 = decimal 3222 (Teknic vendor ID, from OD 0x1018:1)
#   Encoder: 12800 cnts/rev for -Rxxx models, 51200 cnts/rev for -Exxx models.
#   miniOS default build targets -Exxx (51200 cpr) — required for the gear
#   primitive (9.5) to hit DIN 5/6 on hobbing/power-skiving. -Rxxx works for
#   development but gives ~4x coarser phase resolution at the motor shaft.
#   Free Run sync mode NOT supported
#   dc_assign 0x0300 (DC-Sync OpMode AssignActivate) - from ESI Teknic_ClearPathEC_ESI.xml line 8183
#     Slave leaves CycleTimeSync0 / ShiftTimeSync0 / Sync1 = 0 (master picks at runtime)
#     The Free Run / SM-Synchron OpMode uses AssignActivate=0x0000
#   CoE capabilities (ESI line 8171): SdoInfo, PdoAssign, PdoConfig, CompleteAccess,
#   FMMUs required (ESI lines 7505-7507): Outputs, Inputs, MBoxState (3 FMMUs)
#   Mailbox timeouts (ESI lines 23-25): RequestTimeout=2000 ms, ResponseTimeout=20000 ms
#   PDOs declared Fixed="0" => master may remap entries in PREOP (not just reassign).
#   Drive ships a second deprecated device entry "ClearPath EC (CoE Rev 1)"
#     ProductCode=0x1 RevisionNo=0x1 in the same ESI - master should refuse it
#     CSP  (default at boot): RxPDO 0x1601 / TxPDO 0x1A01   <-- NOT 0x1600/0x1A00
#   CoE DiagHistory pool: ESI carries 53 DiagMessage entries with TextIds
#     (0xABxx / 0xACxx) and English text - resolve TextIds read from 0x10F3
#     against this table rather than inventing our own strings.
# are writable ONLY in PREOP state.
# Interpolation time period must be set to match master cycle time.

column6: ITP value: 25 * 10^-5 s = 250 µs (must match master cycle)

column1: # Keep these two in sync with ethercat/master.cpp Master(..., period_us). CI gate enforces.
# Watchdog: ESI does not specify a slave-side default; master sets 0x0400/0x0410/0x0420
#   at SafeOp. Typical choice: divider 0x0400=0x09C2 (2498 cycles of 40ns = 100us tick)
#   and PDI/SM watchdog counts scaled so timeout ≈ 100 ms. Confirm against real hardware.
# Combined PDO (0x1600 RxPDO / 0x1A00 TxPDO) - covers all operating modes
# slave sm dir pdo entry sub bits pin type
# index sub bits typ access default note

column8: Save All Parameters - write 0x65766173 to persist to EEPROM
Application Config Register (bit23=Move Done Torque Foldback, bit24=software limit home offset base)
Move Done Torque Foldback Tc ms (0-10000)
Hardstop Torque Maximum (0.1% trq, 0-1000) - hardstop homing
Mechanical Position (single-turn absolute encoder cnts; -1 = not yet indexed)
Delay Disable Time ms (0-16383) - lets brake engage before disable
Physical Home Clearance cnts - backoff from hardstop; Teknic recommends >= 1/2 rev
Shaft Homing Target cnts - for methods 33/34
Digital Input Map - limit/home/interlock routing, autobrake
RMS Level (0.1%) - thermal load, shuts down at 100%
Overspeed Timeout ms - only in CSP/CST/TQ
Quick Stop Option (-2 pos-hold, -1 dyn-brake, 0 coast, 2 decel-to-stop)
Home Offset (cnts) - position reported after homing
Min Software Position Limit (cnts; homing required first)
Max Software Position Limit (cnts; homing required first)
Polarity (bit6 velocity/torque, bit7 position); inverts demand only, not measured
Profile Velocity (cnts/s; PP mode) — miniOS default: 500k cnt/s (~10 rev/s on 51200-cpr encoder). Drive ESI has no default; master must write.
Profile Acceleration (cnts/s^2; PP/PV) — miniOS default: 1M cnt/s^2 (0.5s to Profile Velocity). Drive ESI has no default; master must write.
Profile Deceleration (cnts/s^2; PP/PV) — matches 0x6083 by default.
Torque Slope (0.1% peak / s) - TQ mode ramp
Touch Probe Function (2 probes, edge select, zero-pulse or input)
Supported Homing Methods count; entries at 1..11
Digital Inputs (bit0 neg-lim, bit1 pos-lim, bit2 home, bit3 interlock, bit16 inA, bit17 inB, bit18 brake, bit19 ethercat-up)
Alert Register - real-time shutdown detail (use ClearView)
RAS Delay ms (anti-hunt RAS - Regressive Auto-Spline)
